entry.title: Sushant के पिता ने Rhea के खिलाफ किया FIR; Rhea पर उकसाने और पैसे हड़पने का आरोप FilmiBeat

link.title: Sushant के पिता ने Rhea के खिलाफ किया FIR; Rhea पर उकसाने और पैसे हड़पने का आरोप FilmiBeat

entry.content:
Sushant Singh Rajput’s father KK Singh files case against Rhea Chakraborty. Watch video to know more.
#SushantSinghRajput #RheaChakrabortyFIR #SushantFatherKKSingh #RheaSushantMoney
entry.summary: Sushant Singh Rajput’s father KK Singh files case against Rhea Chakraborty. Watch video to know more. #SushantSinghRajput #RheaChakrabortyFIR #SushantFatherKKSingh #RheaSushantMoney

entry.title: Duck … duck … down the slip n’ slide they go in Kentucky

link.title: Duck … duck … down the slip n’ slide they go in Kentucky

entry.content:
A batch of ducks have their day under the sun going down a slip n’ slide at the Nulu Bock Fest in Louisville, Kentucky. (March 30, 2018)
Filmed at the local beer and goat race festival, the ducklings are seen trying to eat their feed, but instead, they slide down into the water as they approach for food.
entry.summary: A batch of ducks have their day under the sun going down a slip n’ slide at the Nulu Bock Fest in Louisville, Kentucky. (March 30, 2018) Filmed at the local beer and goat race festival, the ducklings are seen trying to eat their feed, but instead, they slide down into the water as they approach for food.

entry.title: AOC responds to Yoho: ‘Stop using women as shields for bad behaviour’ Oneindia News

link.title: AOC responds to Yoho: ‘Stop using women as shields for bad behaviour’ Oneindia News

entry.content:
Representative Alexandria Ocasio Cortez gave a speech that called out rampant misogyny in lawmakers of the US, and particularly in the members of the Republican Party. She addressed the House of Representatives and narrated an incident when Florida representative Ted Yoho had "put his finger in" her face and called her "disgusting, crazy and out of her mind". Later, he also called her a ‘fuing bch’ in front of reporters and then made ‘excuses’.
#AOCspeech #TedYoho #AOCresponse
entry.summary: Representative Alexandria Ocasio Cortez gave a speech that called out rampant misogyny in lawmakers of the US, and particularly in the members of the Republican Party. She addressed the House of Representatives and narrated an incident when Florida representative Ted Yoho had "put his finger in" her face and called her "disgusting, crazy and out of her mind". Later, he also called her a ‘fuing bch’ in front of reporters and then made ‘excuses’. #AOCspeech #TedYoho #AOCresponse

entry.title: Esperpéntico show de una concejal podemita en Alicante: ‘El aire acondicionado es una muestra de micromachismo’

link.title: Esperpéntico show de una concejal podemita en Alicante: ‘El aire acondicionado es una muestra de micromachismo’

entry.content:
«Que estemos ahora pasando frío nosotras es un micromachismo». La edil de Unidas Podemos en el Ayuntamiento de Alicante, Vanessa Romero, protagonizó el pleno celebrado est 30 de julio de 2020 al relacionar las conductas machistas con la refrigeración de la sala. La concejala se expresó en estos términos antes de comenzar su intervención, que versaba sobre el Plan de Igualdad en el Consistorio.
El alcalde de Alicante, Luis Barcala, del Partido Popular, preguntó a Romero si se trababa de «una broma» ante lo que la dirigente de Unidas Podemos se reafirmó en su argumento: «El estándar de los 24 o 27 grados de confort fue establecido en los años sesenta y se tomó como referencia a un varón de unos 40 años y setenta kilos de peso, por eso es por lo que comentaba esto. El de las mujeres suele ser tres grados por encima. Tal vez sea momento de actualizarlo».
Barcala replicó que sería «más fácil pedir que se quite el aire acondicionado y sudemos todos en igualdad» en lugar de hacer referencias al micromachismo.
entry.summary: «Que estemos ahora pasando frío nosotras es un micromachismo». La edil de Unidas Podemos en el Ayuntamiento de Alicante, Vanessa Romero, protagonizó el pleno celebrado est 30 de julio de 2020 al relacionar las conductas machistas con la refrigeración de la sala. La concejala se expresó en estos términos antes de comenzar su intervención, que versaba sobre el Plan de Igualdad en el Consistorio. El alcalde de Alicante, Luis Barcala, del Partido Popular, preguntó a Romero si se trababa de «una broma» ante lo que la dirigente de Unidas Podemos se reafirmó en su argumento: «El estándar de los 24 o 27 grados de confort fue establecido en los años sesenta y se tomó como referencia a un varón de unos 40 años y setenta kilos de peso, por eso es por lo que comentaba esto. El de las mujeres suele ser tres grados por encima. Tal vez sea momento de actualizarlo». Barcala replicó que sería «más fácil pedir que se quite el aire acondicionado y sudemos todos en igualdad» en lugar de hacer referencias al micromachismo.

entry.title: États-Unis : Google va proposer d’identifier les commerces tenus par des Noirs

link.title: États-Unis : Google va proposer d’identifier les commerces tenus par des Noirs

entry.content: Google aussi veut surfer sur la vague Black Lives Matter. Aux États-Unis, il va proposer, dans les résultats de recherche, et sur Google Maps, d’identifier les commerces tenus par des Afro-Américains, rapporte le média américain The Verge.
entry.summary: Google aussi veut surfer sur la vague Black Lives Matter. Aux États-Unis, il va proposer, dans les résultats de recherche, et sur Google Maps, d’identifier les commerces tenus par des Afro-Américains, rapporte le média américain The Verge.

entry.title: IPL 2020: New Zealand Cricket Board will issue NOCs to all IPL-Bound players वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: IPL 2020: New Zealand Cricket Board will issue NOCs to all IPL-Bound players वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
New Zealand Cricket will issue No Objection Certificates to all its six internationals set to compete in the IPL but said the due diligence on health safety protocols will have to be done by the players themselves. The six New Zealand players who are set to play in the IPL are Jimmy Neesham , Lockie Ferguson, Mitchell McClenaghan and Trent Boult, Kane Williamson and Mitchell Santner.
न्यूजीलैंड क्रिकेट इंडियन प्रीमियर लीग से अनुबंधित अपने सभी छह अंतरराष्ट्रीय खिलाड़ियों को एनओसी देगा लेकिन बोर्ड ने साथ ही कहा कि खिलाड़ियों को स्वास्थ्य सुरक्षा नियमों को लेकर स्वयं ही सतर्कता बरतनी होगी।आईपीएल में न्यूजीलैंड के जो छह खिलाड़ी खेलेंगे उनमें किंग्स इलेवन पंजाब के जिमी नीशाम, कोलकाता नाइट राइडर्स के लॉकी फर्ग्युसन, मुंबई इंडियन्स के मिशेल मैकलेनाघन और ट्रेंट बोल्ट, सनराइजर्स हैदराबाद के केन विलियमसन और चेन्नई सुपरकिंग्स के मिशेल सेंटनर शामिल हैं।
#IPL2020 #NewZealandPlayers #NewZealandBoard
entry.summary: New Zealand Cricket will issue No Objection Certificates to all its six internationals set to compete in the IPL but said the due diligence on health safety protocols will have to be done by the players themselves. The six New Zealand players who are set to play in the IPL are Jimmy Neesham , Lockie Ferguson, Mitchell McClenaghan and Trent Boult, Kane Williamson and Mitchell Santner. न्यूजीलैंड क्रिकेट इंडियन प्रीमियर लीग से अनुबंधित अपने सभी छह अंतरराष्ट्रीय खिलाड़ियों को एनओसी देगा लेकिन बोर्ड ने साथ ही कहा कि खिलाड़ियों को स्वास्थ्य सुरक्षा नियमों को लेकर स्वयं ही सतर्कता बरतनी होगी।आईपीएल में न्यूजीलैंड के जो छह खिलाड़ी खेलेंगे उनमें किंग्स इलेवन पंजाब के जिमी नीशाम, कोलकाता नाइट राइडर्स के लॉकी फर्ग्युसन, मुंबई इंडियन्स के मिशेल मैकलेनाघन और ट्रेंट बोल्ट, सनराइजर्स हैदराबाद के केन विलियमसन और चेन्नई सुपरकिंग्स के मिशेल सेंटनर शामिल हैं। #IPL2020 #NewZealandPlayers #NewZealandBoard

entry.title: Someone else is the mastermind of SSR case: Shekhar Suman

link.title: Someone else is the mastermind of SSR case: Shekhar Suman

entry.content: Should there be a CBI inquiry in Sushant Singh Rajput case? Does Riya believe in ghosts? Why did the family tell lies about Riya’s studies? The story behind Sushant’s change of flat 6 months ago? After all, what is the connection of Riya and family in Sushant case? Actor Shekhar Suman said on this issue, from the clues that are being received now, it seems that the master mind of this matter is someone else. In this case, Riya is a small link. Earlier, no direction was seen in this matter, but now the curtain is visible from the conspiracy. Sushant’s mastmind is still hidden. If one end is found then the rest will also be found. Whatever happened to Sushant wanted to do with me too, but could not. My son is also in his Shinkaje, but I hope he comes out too. #JusticeForSushant #DeshKiBahas
entry.summary: Should there be a CBI inquiry in Sushant Singh Rajput case? Does Riya believe in ghosts? Why did the family tell lies about Riya’s studies? The story behind Sushant’s change of flat 6 months ago? After all, what is the connection of Riya and family in Sushant case? Actor Shekhar Suman said on this issue, from the clues that are being received now, it seems that the master mind of this matter is someone else. In this case, Riya is a small link. Earlier, no direction was seen in this matter, but now the curtain is visible from the conspiracy. Sushant’s mastmind is still hidden. If one end is found then the rest will also be found. Whatever happened to Sushant wanted to do with me too, but could not. My son is also in his Shinkaje, but I hope he comes out too. #JusticeForSushant #DeshKiBahas

entry.title: IPL 2020: Two IPL tournaments in span of six months, big tension for BCCI वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: IPL 2020: Two IPL tournaments in span of six months, big tension for BCCI वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
The Board of Control for Cricket in India no longer has the tension of the corona virus nor is it going to get permission from the central government, it is suffering only a tension whether the market will be able to withstand two IPLs in the next six months? IPL will be held in the UAE from 19 September to 8 November. The IPL Governing Council is scheduled to meet on Sunday.
भारतीय क्रिकेट कंट्रोल बोर्ड को अब ना ही कोरोना वायरस की टेंशन है और ना ही केंद्र सरकार से अनुमति मिलने की, उसको सिर्फ एक टेंशन सता रही है कि क्या मार्केट अगले छह महीने में दो आइपीएल झेल पाएगा? इस साल आइपीएल भारत में 29 मार्च से 24 मई तक प्रस्तावित था लेकिन कोरोना वायरस के कारण इसे स्थगित कर दिया गया। अब आइपीएल का आयोजन 19 सितंबर से आठ नवंबर तक संयुक्त अरब अमीरात में होगा। आइपीएल गवर्निग काउंसिल की बैठक रविवार को होनी है।
#IPL2020 #IPL2021 #BCCI
entry.summary: The Board of Control for Cricket in India no longer has the tension of the corona virus nor is it going to get permission from the central government, it is suffering only a tension whether the market will be able to withstand two IPLs in the next six months? IPL will be held in the UAE from 19 September to 8 November. The IPL Governing Council is scheduled to meet on Sunday. भारतीय क्रिकेट कंट्रोल बोर्ड को अब ना ही कोरोना वायरस की टेंशन है और ना ही केंद्र सरकार से अनुमति मिलने की, उसको सिर्फ एक टेंशन सता रही है कि क्या मार्केट अगले छह महीने में दो आइपीएल झेल पाएगा? इस साल आइपीएल भारत में 29 मार्च से 24 मई तक प्रस्तावित था लेकिन कोरोना वायरस के कारण इसे स्थगित कर दिया गया। अब आइपीएल का आयोजन 19 सितंबर से आठ नवंबर तक संयुक्त अरब अमीरात में होगा। आइपीएल गवर्निग काउंसिल की बैठक रविवार को होनी है। #IPL2020 #IPL2021 #BCCI

entry.title: Nag Panchami 2020: भगवान शिव के गले में सांप क्यों है Kissa Puran Shiv Vasukhi Story Boldsky

link.title: Nag Panchami 2020: भगवान शिव के गले में सांप क्यों है Kissa Puran Shiv Vasukhi Story Boldsky

entry.content:
Lord Shiva, the Supreme and one of the prime deities in Hinduism is often depicted as a blue skinned deity sitting in a meditative pose Being the Supreme power, Lord Shiva is known for His patience, wit, anger, giving and forgiving nature. All the various shades of the Lord and every element that we often see in the paintings and iconography of the deities have a significant role to play. Symbolism plays a key role in Hinduism and it teaches us the truth of life and how one should lead life. The snake that is often seen coiled three times around Lord Shiva’s neck facing towards the right side is Vasuki.
श‌िव के गले में विषधर नाग कहां से आया, भगवान शिव के साथ हमेशा नाग होता है । इस नाग का नाम है वासुकी । इस नाग के बारे में पुराणों में बताया गया है कि यह नागों के राजा हैं और नागलोक पर इनका शासन है। सागर मंथन के समय इन्होंने रस्सी का काम किया था जिससे सागर को मथा गया था । भगवान शिव ने आखिर क्यों गले में धारण किया है वासुकी नाग को और क्या है नागलोक का रहस्य ।
#ShivVasuki #NagPanchami2020 #ShivSavesVasuki
entry.summary: Lord Shiva, the Supreme and one of the prime deities in Hinduism is often depicted as a blue skinned deity sitting in a meditative pose Being the Supreme power, Lord Shiva is known for His patience, wit, anger, giving and forgiving nature. All the various shades of the Lord and every element that we often see in the paintings and iconography of the deities have a significant role to play. Symbolism plays a key role in Hinduism and it teaches us the truth of life and how one should lead life. The snake that is often seen coiled three times around Lord Shiva’s neck facing towards the right side is Vasuki. श‌िव के गले में विषधर नाग कहां से आया, भगवान शिव के साथ हमेशा नाग होता है । इस नाग का नाम है वासुकी । इस नाग के बारे में पुराणों में बताया गया है कि यह नागों के राजा हैं और नागलोक पर इनका शासन है। सागर मंथन के समय इन्होंने रस्सी का काम किया था जिससे सागर को मथा गया था । भगवान शिव ने आखिर क्यों गले में धारण किया है वासुकी नाग को और क्या है नागलोक का रहस्य । #ShivVasuki #NagPanchami2020 #ShivSavesVasuki

entry.title: Terrible Jungle - bande-annonce

link.title: Terrible Jungle - bande-annonce

entry.content:
Eliott (Vincent Dedienne), jeune chercheur naïf, part étudier les Otopis, un peuple mystérieux d’Amazonie. C’est aussi l’occasion pour lui de s’éloigner de l’emprise de sa mère, la possessive Chantal de Bellabre (Catherine Deneuve). Mais celle-ci, inquiète pour lui, décide de partir à sa recherche en s’aventurant dans l’étrange forêt amazonienne.
Au cinéma le 29 juillet 2020.
entry.summary: Eliott (Vincent Dedienne), jeune chercheur naïf, part étudier les Otopis, un peuple mystérieux d’Amazonie. C’est aussi l’occasion pour lui de s’éloigner de l’emprise de sa mère, la possessive Chantal de Bellabre (Catherine Deneuve). Mais celle-ci, inquiète pour lui, décide de partir à sa recherche en s’aventurant dans l’étrange forêt amazonienne. Au cinéma le 29 juillet 2020.

entry.title: Course d’orientation au Pays basque - préparation 2020-2021

link.title: Course d’orientation au Pays basque - préparation 2020-2021

entry.content: Pelote basque, chant, mime, lancer d’espadrilles… nos Acéistes se sont affrontés hier au cours d’une activité mémorable ! Divisés en 4 équipes, les Blanc et Rouge n’avaient pas idée de ce qu’ils les attendaient dans la forêt de Chiberta à Anglet. Cette course d’orientation aux multiples épreuves a permis aux Ours de vivre un moment de cohésion, dans la bonne humeur. Découvrez quel groupe à remporter l’épreuve en vidéo. Fou rire assuré.
entry.summary: Pelote basque, chant, mime, lancer d’espadrilles… nos Acéistes se sont affrontés hier au cours d’une activité mémorable ! Divisés en 4 équipes, les Blanc et Rouge n’avaient pas idée de ce qu’ils les attendaient dans la forêt de Chiberta à Anglet. Cette course d’orientation aux multiples épreuves a permis aux Ours de vivre un moment de cohésion, dans la bonne humeur. Découvrez quel groupe à remporter l’épreuve en vidéo. Fou rire assuré.

entry.title: Coronavirus और Flood की वजह से EC ने टाले 8 निर्वाचन क्षत्रों में By-Election वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Coronavirus और Flood की वजह से EC ने टाले 8 निर्वाचन क्षत्रों में By-Election वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Election Commission postponed by-elections in 8 constituencies due to coronavirus and floods. In view of the havoc and floods in the country, the Election Commission has deferred by-elections in 8 constituencies. The Election Commission has said that by-elections will be held as soon as the conditions are fine.
देश में कोरोना के कहर और बाढ़ की मार को देखते हुए इलेक्शन कमीशन ने 8 निर्वाचन क्षेत्रों के उप-चुनाव टाल दिए हैं. चुनाव आयोग ने कहा है जैसे ही हालात ठीक होंगे तब उप चुनाव कराए जाएंगे.
#ElectionCommission #ByElections #Coronavirus
entry.summary: Election Commission postponed by-elections in 8 constituencies due to coronavirus and floods. In view of the havoc and floods in the country, the Election Commission has deferred by-elections in 8 constituencies. The Election Commission has said that by-elections will be held as soon as the conditions are fine. देश में कोरोना के कहर और बाढ़ की मार को देखते हुए इलेक्शन कमीशन ने 8 निर्वाचन क्षेत्रों के उप-चुनाव टाल दिए हैं. चुनाव आयोग ने कहा है जैसे ही हालात ठीक होंगे तब उप चुनाव कराए जाएंगे. #ElectionCommission #ByElections #Coronavirus

entry.title: Dog Rides Owner’s Back As He Swims

link.title: Dog Rides Owner’s Back As He Swims

entry.content: This dog, Macy loved to swim with her owner. As he swam across the river, Macy hopped onto his back and enjoyed her ride across.
entry.summary: This dog, Macy loved to swim with her owner. As he swam across the river, Macy hopped onto his back and enjoyed her ride across.

entry.content:
Talking about the scene, Shweta was not convinced that it’ll come out properly as she found it challenging.

entry.title: Gardeners World episode 20 2020

link.title: Gardeners World episode 20 2020

entry.content:
Gardeners World episode 20 2020: At Longmeadow, Monty refreshes a container of overgrown herbs, plants alpines in a pot and revisits the shrub and perennial cuttings he took a few weeks ago. Arit Anderson travels to Kent to meet a designer who is placing sustainability and the environment at the heart of the gardens she designs, and the team discover a garden in Dorset that has been laid out specifically with scent in mind.
Last gardening post on HDclump.com:
entry.summary: Gardeners World episode 20 2020: At Longmeadow, Monty refreshes a container of overgrown herbs, plants alpines in a pot and revisits the shrub and perennial cuttings he took a few weeks ago. Arit Anderson travels to Kent to meet a designer who is placing sustainability and the environment at the heart of the gardens she designs, and the team discover a garden in Dorset that has been laid out specifically with scent in mind. Last gardening post on HDclump.com:

entry.title: Xander Bogaerts Puts Pressure On Rafael Devers To Do English Interviews

link.title: Xander Bogaerts Puts Pressure On Rafael Devers To Do English Interviews

entry.content:
Xander Bogaerts Puts Pressure On Rafael Devers To Do English Interviews
Xander Bogaerts Puts Pressure On Rafael Devers To Do English Interviews

entry.title: Hancock announces new lockdown measures in the North

link.title: Hancock announces new lockdown measures in the North

entry.content: Health Secretary Matt Hancock has announced that from midnight tonight, people in Greater Manchester, parts of West Yorkshire and East Lancashire who live in different households will be banned from meeting indoors. Report by Browna. Like us on Facebook at and follow us on Twitter at
entry.summary: Health Secretary Matt Hancock has announced that from midnight tonight, people in Greater Manchester, parts of West Yorkshire and East Lancashire who live in different households will be banned from meeting indoors. Report by Browna. Like us on Facebook at and follow us on Twitter at

entry.title: MLB and MLBPA Extend 2020 Postseason from 10 to 16 Teams

link.title: MLB and MLBPA Extend 2020 Postseason from 10 to 16 Teams

entry.content:
MLB and the MLBPA have agreed to extend the 2020 postseason from ten to 16 teams.
MLB and MLBPA Extend 2020 Postseason from 10 to 16 Teams
MLB and MLBPA Extend 2020 Postseason from 10 to 16 Teams
MLB and MLBPA Extend 2020 Postseason from 10 to 16 Teams
entry.summary: MLB and the MLBPA have agreed to extend the 2020 postseason from ten to 16 teams.MLB and MLBPA Extend 2020 Postseason from 10 to 16 Teams MLB and MLBPA Extend 2020 Postseason from 10 to 16 Teams MLB and MLBPA Extend 2020 Postseason from 10 to 16 Teams

entry.title: ENG vs IRE 1st ODI England won by 6 wickets.

link.title: ENG vs IRE 1st ODI England won by 6 wickets.

entry.content:
#engvsire
#engvire
ENG vs IRE : Here is the England vs Ireland 1st ODI match report. England chased 173 runs easily and won by 6 wickets.
அயர்லாந்து அணியை 6 விக்கெட் வித்தியாசத்தில் வீழ்த்தி எளிதாக வென்றது இங்கிலாந்து அணி.
entry.summary: #engvsire #engvire ENG vs IRE : Here is the England vs Ireland 1st ODI match report. England chased 173 runs easily and won by 6 wickets. அயர்லாந்து அணியை 6 விக்கெட் வித்தியாசத்தில் வீழ்த்தி எளிதாக வென்றது இங்கிலாந்து அணி.

entry.title: Coronavirus vaccine: UK signs new deal for 60 million doses of potential COVID-19 solution

link.title: Coronavirus vaccine: UK signs new deal for 60 million doses of potential COVID-19 solution

entry.content: The world’s wealthiest countries are pre-ordering hundreds of millions of doses of potential vaccines – but there is no certainty any of them will effectively protect against COVID-19.View on euronews
entry.summary: The world’s wealthiest countries are pre-ordering hundreds of millions of doses of potential vaccines – but there is no certainty any of them will effectively protect against COVID-19.View on euronews

entry.title: Villages evacuated in southern Greece as large wildfire sweeps through area

link.title: Villages evacuated in southern Greece as large wildfire sweeps through area

entry.content:
250 firefighters and a water-dropping aircraft were working to contain the blazeView on euronews

entry.title: Guy Shows Amazing Moves While Doing Double Dutch Dance

link.title: Guy Shows Amazing Moves While Doing Double Dutch Dance

entry.content:
This guy was doing a double dutch dance with the help of his two friends. He was jumping off two big ropes turning into the opposite direction. He made the dance more exciting by mingling some hip-hop moves and finished the dance with style.
The underlying music rights are not available for license. For use of the video with the track(s) contained therein, please contact the music publisher(s) or relevant rightsholder(s).
entry.summary: This guy was doing a double dutch dance with the help of his two friends. He was jumping off two big ropes turning into the opposite direction. He made the dance more exciting by mingling some hip-hop moves and finished the dance with style. The underlying music rights are not available for license. For use of the video with the track(s) contained therein, please contact the music publisher(s) or relevant rightsholder(s).
